description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug Docker image with an empty entrypoint and defines a hidden .kaniko-build-template job in the .pre stage. The template sets up Docker auth via KANIKO_DOCKER_CONFIG, derives COMPONENT, IMAGE, REPOSITORY, VERSION variables, prints build details, runs /kaniko/executor with the provided CONTEXT, DOCKERFILE, destination image, cache enabled (48h TTL, cache repo), and writes IMAGE, VERSION, DIGEST information to a ci.env dotenv artifact that expires in 7 days. Add a builder-build job that extends this template, runs in the .pre stage, uses the builder environment pointing to the container registry URL, triggers only on changes to Dockerfile or CI config files, and supplies BUILD_ARGS=--target builder, COMPONENT=$BUILDER_COMPONENT, CONTEXT=., DOCKERFILE=Dockerfile. Add a builder-test job in the build stage that echoes $CARGO_HOME and $RUSTUP_HOME and runs rustc --version --verbose, cargo --version --verbose, rustup --version --verbose, rustfmt --version, cargo clippy --version, cargo readme --version, cargo audit --version, cargo sweep --version, cargo tree --version, toml --version, jq --version, and diff --version. Include the external /.gitlab-ci.config.yml file.
